name: qmd
description: 搜索 personal knowledge bases, notes, docs, and meeting transcripts locally using qmd — a hybrid retrieval engine with BM25, vector search, and LLM reranking.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 qmd 相關工作
幫我啟用 qmd 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 qmd

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the qmd skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
